summary: Add a draggable left-cutoff threshold to DFM ratio charts.
details: Ratio chart popups now show a grey vertical threshold at the left edge of the plot area.
Dragging the threshold right excludes valid ratio points to the left of the line for the opened ratio column.
Existing exclusions and manual table-cell or chart-point exclusions made while the chart is open are protected from threshold-line actions until the chart closes.
Unprotected threshold-owned exclusions now reverse when the threshold lines move back past those points.
The chart y-axis stays fixed while a threshold line is being dragged and resizes after the drag finishes.
Dragging the top or bottom y-axis label shows a red preview line and applies a custom max or min y-axis boundary for zooming the open chart.
Y-axis label drags can expand the custom boundary beyond the current plot range, and double-clicking a top or bottom y-axis label resets that custom boundary.
